system.name: Eternals
system.summary: Eternals are deity blessings chosen in the draft phase. Pick one Eternal, then one blessing from each of its two minor slots (1 Major + 2 Minors). Choices are saved per hero/role and can be changed any time.
system.structure: 1 Major Blessing + 1 blessing from Minor Slot 1 + 1 blessing from Minor Slot 2.
system.note: Eternals are brand new this patch, so there is no win-rate data yet. These recommendations are based on how each Eternal's effects synergize with a hero's stat profile, traits, damage type, and role.

categories.Primarchs: Domineering entities known for their raw strength and unquenchable thirst for conquest, standing alone as the supreme arbiters of war. Primarchs are best suited to Heroes looking to dive into the fray of battle, offering a healthy mix of durability and damage.
categories.Dreadnoughts: Enduring entities known for their boundless resilience and absolute power, standing against the stars as immovable forces of nature. Dreadnoughts are best suited to Heroes looking to increase their durability and disruption capabilities, better allowing them to thrive in the thick of combat.
categories.Sovereigns: Imperious entities of astral lineage, celebrated for their terrifying grandeur and their command over the primordial forces of chaos and order. Sovereigns are best suited to Heroes looking to increase their proficiency in combat via increased ability damage and burst potential.
categories.Divines: Radiant entities known for their unyielding preservation and transcendent aura, standing as the bastions of absolute light against the encroachment of the void. Divines are best suited to Heroes that thrive on miraculous empowerment & general utility, be that for sustaining and enhancing themselves, or their allies.
categories.Anomalies: Enigmatic entities known for their unconventional manipulation of reality, often evoking confusion and paranoia in those who dare oppose them. Anomalies are best suited to any Hero looking to defy conventional logic, enhancing them with a broad range of unconventional, specialized effects.

eternals.name: Vesh
eternals.major: Damaging an Enemy Hero with an ability deals 6% (+0.5% per minute) of the damage as a DoT over 3s.

minorSlot1.name: Lich
minorSlot1.desc: Gain 8% (+0.5% per Level) Magical Lifesteal.

minorSlot1.name: Tithe of Death
minorSlot1.desc: Takedowns grant 2 Ability Haste.

minorSlot1.name: The Tenth Seal
minorSlot1.desc: At Level 10, gain 5% Ultimate Damage and 25 Ultimate Ability Haste.

minorSlot2.name: Mind Rot
minorSlot2.desc: The major also deals 2% of the target's current health as bonus damage.

minorSlot2.name: Phylactery
minorSlot2.desc: After your Ultimate, gain a shield equal to 15% of Max Mana for 4s.

minorSlot2.name: Millennia
minorSlot2.desc: Every 60s, increase your Ultimate Ability Damage by 1%.

recommend.note: Spread DoTs across the enemy team; Mind Rot makes the major bite into tanks and the per-minute scaling makes you a late-game teamfight monster.

eternals.counterTip: Their ability hits leave a scaling DoT behind — itemize health regen/tenacity and avoid eating full combos.

eternals.name: Aion
eternals.major: Casting a spell grants 1 Mana Regeneration for 8s (stacks 5x). Spells also grant gold equal to 8% of damage dealt to Enemy Heroes.

minorSlot1.name: Philosopher
minorSlot1.desc: Every 10s, generate 5 gold (faster with Ability Haste).

minorSlot1.name: Sacrifice
minorSlot1.desc: Killing an Enemy Unit grants +2 Mana Regen for 5s (30x on hero kills).

minorSlot1.name: Bottomless Vial
minorSlot1.desc: Killing a River Buff restores a Potion charge and grants +4 Magical Power permanently.

minorSlot2.name: Arcane Resonance
minorSlot2.desc: Basic ability cooldowns and Philosopher progress 1% faster per 1 Mana Regen.

minorSlot2.name: Perfection
minorSlot2.desc: While above 90% Health, gain 30 Ability Haste.

minorSlot2.name: Runic Focus
minorSlot2.desc: Gain 0.15% increased Magical Power per 1% current Mana.

recommend.note: Snowball gold from spell damage and convert your big mana pool into power — ideal for ability-spam mages who poke constantly.

eternals.counterTip: They snowball gold and mana off spell damage — deny poke trades and punish them when their abilities are on cooldown.

eternals.name: Vermis
eternals.major: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack on the same Enemy Hero within 2.5s deals 3% (+0.25% per Level) of their Max Health as bonus Physical Damage.

minorSlot1.name: Serration
minorSlot1.desc: The major is 65% more effective on Basic Attacks that Critically Strike.

minorSlot1.name: Crush
minorSlot1.desc: Immobilizing an Enemy Hero deals 5% of their Max Health as bonus Physical Damage.

minorSlot1.name: Cauterize
minorSlot1.desc: When damaged by a DoT, gain 2 (+0.5 per level) Health Regeneration for 1s.

minorSlot2.name: Melting Point
minorSlot2.desc: Deal 10% bonus damage to targets with more than 125 Physical Armor.

minorSlot2.name: Breach
minorSlot2.desc: Damaging a hero with your Ultimate reduces their Physical Armor by 30%.

minorSlot2.name: Sub-Surface
minorSlot2.desc: Take 10% less damage from AoE Abilities.

recommend.note: Crit-amplify the max-HP proc and shred tanks — the classic on-hit carry anti-tank package.

eternals.counterTip: They ramp damage every 3rd auto on the same target — break their rhythm by juking or trading then disengaging, and stack armor.

eternals.name: Thraex
eternals.major: Mark the last Enemy Hero damaged by your Basic Attack for 3s, increasing your damage against them by 3% (+0.5% per level) and reducing the damage they deal to you by 1.5% (+0.4% per level).

minorSlot1.name: Alpha's Court
minorSlot1.desc: Deal 6% bonus damage when no allied hero is within 800 units.

minorSlot1.name: Savage Strikes
minorSlot1.desc: Deal 1.5 (+0.4 per level) physical damage On-Hit, +100% for 3s vs heroes.

minorSlot1.name: The King
minorSlot1.desc: Basic Attacks against Enemy Heroes grant you 7 gold.

minorSlot2.name: Ferocity
minorSlot2.desc: Gain 2% Total Attack Speed per 1s in Hero Combat, stacking infinitely.

minorSlot2.name: Rallying Roar
minorSlot2.desc: Casting your Ultimate grants you and nearby allies 20% movement speed.

minorSlot2.name: Golden Mane
minorSlot2.desc: Take 12% less damage from non-AoE abilities.

recommend.note: On-hit pressure plus infinitely-stacking attack speed — wins extended duels and splitpush fights.

eternals.counterTip: They mark their last auto target for bonus damage — don't sit still in their range; make them re-acquire the mark.

eternals.name: Marrow
eternals.major: Gain 0.5% (+0.05% per level) Omnivamp per 5% Missing Health. This doubles for 8s upon killing an Enemy Hero.

minorSlot1.name: The Maw
minorSlot1.desc: Critical Strikes deal 20% bonus True Damage to targets below 25% Max Health.

minorSlot1.name: Blood Bank
minorSlot1.desc: Gain charges equal to damage dealt to heroes; +1% Lifesteal per 100 charges.

minorSlot1.name: Taste of Iron
minorSlot1.desc: Damaging a hero with a DoT increases your damage by 6% for 3s.

minorSlot2.name: Roses
minorSlot2.desc: Takedowns grant 20 bonus gold per previous takedown.

minorSlot2.name: Jealousy
minorSlot2.desc: Deal 10% bonus damage vs heroes with more current health than you.

minorSlot2.name: Leech
minorSlot2.desc: Enemy heroes within 400 units have base Health Regen reduced by 100%.

recommend.note: Stack lifesteal as you fight and shut off their passive regen — built for divers who go low and live.

eternals.counterTip: They heal more the lower they get and double it on kills — burst them fast or apply anti-heal (grievous wounds).

eternals.name: Xyris
eternals.major: Permanently gain 0.75% Bonus Damage per 10 Units killed.

minorSlot1.name: Furor
minorSlot1.desc: Entering Hero Combat grants 20% Total Attack Speed for 4s.

minorSlot1.name: Dominance
minorSlot1.desc: Takedowns heal you for 50 (+15% Missing Health).

minorSlot1.name: Iron Will
minorSlot1.desc: Heal for 12% of the damage dealt by your Critical Strikes.

minorSlot2.name: Cull the Weak
minorSlot2.desc: Deal +10% bonus damage to Minions and Monsters.

minorSlot2.name: Bone Collector
minorSlot2.desc: Takedowns grant +1.5 Physical / +3 Magical Power permanently (caps 20).

minorSlot2.name: Eviscerate
minorSlot2.desc: Deal +20% bonus damage to targets above 85% Health.

recommend.note: Farm hard, stack permanent power off takedowns, and burst with combat attack speed — the late-game hyper-carry path.

eternals.counterTip: They scale off farm — invade and deny CS, and try to end before they spike.

eternals.name: Demiurge
eternals.major: Increase stats gained from Items (not passives/crests) by 15%, and damage dealt by Item Effects by 12%.

minorSlot1.name: Tri-Core
minorSlot1.desc: Deal 6% bonus damage On-Hit, randomly Physical/Magical/True.

minorSlot1.name: Bloatware
minorSlot1.desc: Gain +1% Increased Damage and +1% Damage Reduction per item owned.

minorSlot1.name: Bio-Mechanical Fusion
minorSlot1.desc: Gain +1 Physical Power per 5 Magical Power you possess.

minorSlot2.name: Cursed Corrupted
minorSlot2.desc: Convert each 1% Crit Chance into 1 Ability Haste (you lose the crit stat).

minorSlot2.name: Memory Leak
minorSlot2.desc: On cast, gain 6% of the mana cost as permanent Max Mana; +5% MS at 600.

minorSlot2.name: Construct
minorSlot2.desc: Gain +1% Base Health/Mana/Physical Power and equal growth.

recommend.note: Rewards a full 6-item build — weak early, but scales harder than anything once the build comes online.

eternals.counterTip: They scale off completed items — pressure them early before the build is online.

eternals.name: Nihil
eternals.major: Damage a hero to gain Doom for 3s. Doom grants 1 Physical Power, 2 Magical Power, 1 Physical Armor & 1 Magical Armor for every 3s it persists. On level-up or Takedown, the stats Doom grants are permanently increased by 20%.

minorSlot1.name: Growing Threat
minorSlot1.desc: At 18 minutes, gain +15% Bonus Damage permanently.

minorSlot1.name: From the Abyss
minorSlot1.desc: Restore 0.6% Max Health/s while in Hero Combat or out of enemy vision.

minorSlot1.name: Mana Siphon
minorSlot1.desc: Hitting a hero with an ability steals 10 (+1% Max Mana) Mana.

minorSlot2.name: Adaptive Plating
minorSlot2.desc: Taking damage grants matching Armor (1% per hit, stacks 8x).

minorSlot2.name: Inescapable
minorSlot2.desc: Enemies within 800u that dash/leap/blink are slowed 20% for 1.5s.

minorSlot2.name: Terror
minorSlot2.desc: Minions/Monsters deal 30% less damage to you; Towers 15% less.

recommend.note: Sustain and scaling armor keep Doom stacking through long brawls — strong on bruisers that never leave the fight.

eternals.counterTip: They stack power and armor the longer a fight runs — burst them early or disengage extended brawls.

eternals.name: Exarch
eternals.major: Healing or Shielding a target (including yourself) grants them 10% Total Attack Speed and empowers their Basic Attacks to deal 10% bonus Magical Damage On-Hit for 4s.

minorSlot1.name: Illumination
minorSlot1.desc: Gain Health Regeneration equal to your Bonus Mana Regeneration.

minorSlot1.name: Preservation
minorSlot1.desc: Any healing or shielding you receive is increased by 15%.

minorSlot1.name: Revelation
minorSlot1.desc: Casting an Ability reduces current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 0.3s.

minorSlot2.name: Fervour
minorSlot2.desc: Basic Attacks vs heroes heal you and nearby allies for 2 (+0.5/lvl)(+6% MP).

minorSlot2.name: Omnipresent
minorSlot2.desc: Gain 8% Movement Speed when out of combat.

minorSlot2.name: Delayed Fate
minorSlot2.desc: 25% of ability damage taken is stored and dealt to you as a DoT instead.

recommend.note: More casts = more empower uptime on your carry; Fervour adds passive team healing on top.

eternals.counterTip: Their heals/shields buff allies' attack speed — apply anti-heal and focus the empowered carry, not the support.

eternals.name: Krix
eternals.major: Gain 10% (+1% per Level) increased Maximum Health, and bonus size equal to 0.5% of your Maximum Health.

minorSlot1.name: Voracity
minorSlot1.desc: Killing an Enemy Unit restores 1.25% of your Maximum Health.

minorSlot1.name: Regenerative Tissue
minorSlot1.desc: After 8s without hero damage, regen 0.6% Max Health/s.

minorSlot1.name: Festering Wounds
minorSlot1.desc: Enemies hit by your DoT effects receive 45% less healing for 2s.

minorSlot2.name: Cannibalism
minorSlot2.desc: Takedowns permanently increase your Maximum Health by 30.

minorSlot2.name: Feeding Frenzy
minorSlot2.desc: Gain +12% Attack Speed per Enemy Hero within 1500 units.

minorSlot2.name: Predator
minorSlot2.desc: Camp Leader kills grant 8% Bonus Damage for 20s (2x on Epic Monsters).

recommend.note: Stack permanent health and grievous-wound the enemy team — an unkillable frontline anchor.

eternals.counterTip: They stack max health (and hitbox) — bring % max-health damage and anti-heal.

eternals.name: Idrisil
eternals.major: While off cooldown and above 30% Max Health, gain 15% increased Physical and Magical Armor. Falling below 30% Health consumes this bonus to grant a 4s Shield equal to 150% of your total Armor (CD: 75–32.5s).

minorSlot1.name: Cold Hearted
minorSlot1.desc: Enemies that basic attack you lose 2% movement speed for 2s (stacks 5x).

minorSlot1.name: Mending
minorSlot1.desc: After taking hero damage, restore 8% of your missing health over 3s.

minorSlot1.name: Frost Snap
minorSlot1.desc: Deal 10% Bonus Damage to Immobilized Targets.

minorSlot2.name: Icy Touch
minorSlot2.desc: Your Basic Attacks reduce enemy Attack Speed by 3% for 3s (stacks 4x).

minorSlot2.name: Glacier
minorSlot2.desc: Permanently gain 1 Magical Armor per 300 total gold earned.

minorSlot2.name: Diamond Tip
minorSlot2.desc: Gain 4% increased Physical and Magical Penetration per finished item.

recommend.note: Layer armor with passive self-sustain to anchor the frontline through poke and pokes.

eternals.counterTip: They get bonus armor above 30% HP — % penetration or magical damage gets through better; burst them below 30%.

eternals.name: Lotus
eternals.major: Every 2 minutes and every Takedown randomly grants +1.75% Damage, +4 Ability Haste, +0.75% Move Speed, or +2% Max Health.

minorSlot1.name: Early Bloom
minorSlot1.desc: Gain an additional Level upon reaching Level 10.

minorSlot1.name: Flawless
minorSlot1.desc: Damaging a hero with an ability heals you and nearby allies for 8.

minorSlot1.name: Masterpiece
minorSlot1.desc: Kills grant +5% Damage and +6% Move Speed for 12s (stacks 5x).

minorSlot2.name: Immaculate
minorSlot2.desc: Gain 35% Damage Reduction above 90% current health.

minorSlot2.name: Prima Donna
minorSlot2.desc: Deal 14% increased damage to heroes, but take 7% increased damage.

minorSlot2.name: Fragrance
minorSlot2.desc: Your True Damage is increased 15% vs heroes within 800 units.

recommend.note: A safe, flexible pick that fits almost any hero — snowball off kills and lean into the damage amp when ahead.

eternals.counterTip: Unpredictable buff timing — play around their cooldowns and deny kills so Masterpiece never stacks.
